evals.prompt: Create a plan for adding JWT authentication to an Express API
evals.expected_output: An atomic plan file saved as plan-feature-auth-*-1.md (or similar). Contains numbered phases (PHASE-001…) and tasks (TASK-001…). Each task has all six canonical fields: Depends on, Files, Symbols, Action, Validate, Expected result. File paths are markdown links. Validate fields are executable shell commands, not prose.

A compact plan with 6-8 named phases and no atomic task breakdown. Each phase has a goal and effort estimate. Total effort estimate and timeline provided. File saved as plan-architecture-*-1.md (or similar). No TASK-NNN blocks — phases only.

evals.prompt: /create-plan --quick "Add form validation to React login component"
evals.expected_output: A plan that skips file discovery and documents path assumptions (e.g., src/, tests/ are assumed standard). Tasks reference expected file paths marked UNVERIFIED or noted as assumed. Discovery step is absent or explicitly skipped. Plan passes the five-step workflow with assumptions documented.
